name: EOA – Post-Event VIP Follow-up Sequence (Speaker & Sponsor)
description: Handles the post-event email sequence for speaker and sponsor segments. Triggered by the Next.js /api/events/[id]/followup route via N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPEAKER_URL and N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPONSOR_URL (both can point to this webhook — segment detected from payload). Loops over the attendees array, branches on segment (speaker vs sponsor), and sends the appropriate multi-step sequence. Speakers get: D+0 thank-you, D+1 AI-generated LinkedIn post draft, D+3 testimonial request, D+14 internal task. Sponsors get: D+0 metrics email, D+1 full recap, D+3 deliverables check, D+30 internal renewal task. Adapted from Ivybound AI personalisation pattern.
n8nEnvVarSetup: N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPEAKER_URL and N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPONSOR_URL should both point to <n8n-base>/webhook/eoa-followup-vip

nodes.name: VIP Sequence Webhook
nodes.notes: Set N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPEAKER_URL and N8N_FOLLOWUP_SPONSOR_URL to this URL. Payload: { event, sequence, attendees: [{id, name, email}], triggered_at }

nodes.name: Loop – One VIP at a Time

parameters.subject: =Your talk was brilliant — here's what happens next
parameters.message:
=

Thank you for speaking at EOA

Hi {{$json.name}},

Your talk at {{$json.eventTitle}} was one of the highlights of the evening. The room was engaged and we had several attendees ask for your contact details afterwards.

Recording

Your raw video will be ready within 48 hours. We'll share it in the WhatsApp community and tag you directly. If you'd like the full unedited file, just reply to this email.

What's coming

  • Tomorrow: A pre-written LinkedIn post you can use to amplify your talk
  • Day 3: A short testimonial request (entirely optional)

Thanks again for sharing your knowledge. The community is stronger because you showed up.

With gratitude,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

nodes.name: AI – Draft LinkedIn Post for Speaker

messages.content: You write concise, authentic LinkedIn posts for founders who just spoke at a community event. The post should sound like the speaker wrote it themselves — genuine and peer-level, not PR. Keep it under 200 words. Max 3 hashtags. Output ONLY valid JSON: { "linkedinPost": "..." }

=Write a LinkedIn post for {{$json.name}} who just spoke at {{$json.eventTitle}} on {{$json.eventDate}}.

The post should:
- Sound like the speaker wrote it (first person)
- Mention speaking at an Entrepreneurs of Asia event in Chiang Mai
- Use [YOUR TALK TOPIC] as a placeholder for the specific topic (they will fill it in)
- Share one insight or reflection from the experience
- Tag @EOAChiangMai
- Feel human and specific, not generic

Output ONLY valid JSON: { "linkedinPost": "..." }

nodes.notes: Ivybound pattern: AI generates personalised draft content per VIP. Adapted for LinkedIn post instead of cold sales email.

parameters.subject: Pre-written LinkedIn post — ready for you to post
parameters.message:
=

Your LinkedIn draft — edit and post whenever you're ready

Hi {{$json.name}},

We put together a LinkedIn post based on your talk. It's just a starting point — edit it however you like before posting.

If you do post it, tagging @EOAChiangMai helps us reach other Chiang Mai founders.

{{$json.linkedinPost}}

Just copy and paste into LinkedIn. Reply to this email if you'd like us to tweak the tone.

The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.subject: Would you leave us a quick testimonial?
parameters.message:
=

A small favour

Hi {{$json.name}},

We're building out a speaker showcase on eoa.cm and would love to include a short quote from you about your experience at EOA.

Two or three sentences is perfect — just reply to this email with something honest. We'll always send you a preview before publishing anything.

Entirely optional — no pressure either way.

Thanks again,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.jsonBody: ={"type": "speaker_next_opportunity", "name": "{{$json.name}}", "email": "{{$json.email}}", "eventTitle": "{{$json.eventTitle}}", "notes": "Reach out to discuss next speaking slot or referral. Spoke at {{$json.eventTitle}} on {{$json.eventDate}}.", "dueDate": "{{$now.plus({days: 7}).toISO()}}"}

nodes.name: Google Sheets CRM – Speaker Sequence Done

parameters.subject: =Thank you — here are last night's numbers
parameters.message:
=

{{$json.eventTitle}} — Event Summary

Hi {{$json.name}},

Thank you for supporting {{$json.eventTitle}}. Here's a quick snapshot of the evening:

MetricResult
Community reachTelegram + WhatsApp — 500+ active members
Event attendanceConfirmed in full recap (sent tomorrow)
Audience profileFounders, operators, and digital nomads in Chiang Mai

Full recap with photos and audience breakdown follows tomorrow.

With thanks,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.subject: =Full event recap for your records
parameters.message:
=

{{$json.eventTitle}} — Full Recap

Hi {{$json.name}},

Deliverables completed

  • Logo placement on event materials ✓
  • Verbal acknowledgment at the event ✓
  • Announcement in EOA Telegram channel ✓
  • WhatsApp community announcement ✓

Photos & Content

Event photos and highlight clips will be shared across community channels within 48 hours. Your brand will be tagged where appropriate.

Questions?

If anything was missed or needs adjustment, please reply to this email. We check in again in a couple of days to confirm everything was delivered.

Thank you for your partnership,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.subject: Checking in on your deliverables
parameters.message:
=

A quick check-in

Hi {{$json.name}},

We wanted to confirm that all agreed deliverables from {{$json.eventTitle}} have been fulfilled on our end.

If anything was missed or you'd like any content adjusted or re-shared, reply to this email and we'll sort it immediately.

We'd also love your honest feedback on the event — what worked, what you'd like to see differently for future sponsorships.

Thanks again,
The EOA Team
eoa.cm

parameters.jsonBody: ={"type": "sponsor_renewal_conversation", "name": "{{$json.name}}", "email": "{{$json.email}}", "eventTitle": "{{$json.eventTitle}}", "notes": "Initiate renewal conversation for next event. Sponsored {{$json.eventTitle}} on {{$json.eventDate}}.", "dueDate": "{{$now.plus({days: 7}).toISO()}}"}
